expectations.text: The command uses 'codex exec' (NOT 'codex exec review') since this is an options review, not a code review
expectations.evidence: Command: codex exec -m gpt-5.4 -c model_reasoning_effort='xhigh' ... (no 'review' subcommand)

expectations.text: The command includes all 3 options in the prompt (SQLite WAL, PostgreSQL pooling, Redis cache)
expectations.evidence: Prompt includes all 3 options: 'Option 1: Dùng SQLite với WAL mode. Option 2: Dùng PostgreSQL với connection pooling. Option 3: Dùng Redis cache layer phía trước SQLite.'

expectations.text: The prompt includes context about 10000 concurrent users
expectations.evidence: Prompt includes: 'Context: đang build hệ thống tracking cho 10000 concurrent users.'

expectations.text: The command includes '-m gpt-5.4' to specify the correct model
The output contains Codex/GPT analysis evaluating the options
expectations.evidence: Full analysis with evaluation table, per-option breakdown, and recommendation (PostgreSQL + pooling)

expectations.text: The agent presents the analysis with some framing or synthesis
expectations.evidence: Result presented with command, model info, and full structured analysis

eval_feedback.overall: Perfect execution of the skill instructions for options review.
